author: mark
text: Also relates to bl-f440 (warm remaster --detach worktree transplant, delivered main 7195428); direct link skipped — installed bl rejects closed link targets.

author: mark
text:
Guard the URL remaster flip against stranding local tasks

bl remaster <url> flips a repo onto a master_url hub via federate_url, which repoints .balls/tasks at the hub's state-repo. Unlike the name path's reconcile, the URL path has no machinery to carry local-only tasks across, so a standalone repo with tasks had them silently stranded on the orphaned .balls/worktree.

federate_url now runs guard_against_strand first: a true standalone repo with any local task aborts before anything is materialized, naming the remedies; a repo already linked to a hub is exempt; the new --force flag proceeds anyway with a warning.
